title: Replace native counseling booking form with Tally embed on 1:1 Counseling Session page

requirements.text: On the 1:1 Counseling Session page (CounselingPage.tsx), replace the existing native CounselingBookingForm component with the Tally embedded form using the following embed code: iframe with data-tally-src='https://tally.so/embed/EkX2OB?hideTitle=1&dynamicHeight=1', loading='lazy', width='100%', height='897', frameborder='0', marginheight='0', marginwidth='0', title='Counseling Session'. Load the Tally embed script (https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js) dynamically using a useEffect hook that replicates the provided script logic: check if Tally is already defined and call Tally.loadEmbeds(), otherwise inject the script tag if not already present. The existing TallyFormEmbed component (frontend/src/components/forms/TallyFormEmbed.tsx) should be reused or updated to support this embed code pattern if it does not already handle it correctly.

quotes: <iframe data-tally-src="https://tally.so/embed/EkX2OB?hideTitle=1&dynamicHeight=1" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="897" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" title="Counseling Session"></iframe>

acceptanceCriteria: The 1:1 Counseling Session page no longer renders the native CounselingBookingForm component in the booking section.
The Tally form iframe with src resolved to https://tally.so/embed/EkX2OB?hideTitle=1&dynamicHeight=1 is rendered in its place.
The Tally embed script is loaded so the iframe renders the form correctly without a blank embed.
The rest of the CounselingPage (hero, session expectations, benefits sections) remains unchanged.
The scroll-to-form functionality on the page still scrolls to the Tally embed section.

constraints: Preserve all other sections of CounselingPage.tsx (hero, session expectations, benefits) exactly as they are.
Do not remove or modify the CounselingBookingForm component file itself — only stop using it on CounselingPage.tsx.
Use the exact Tally embed URL and parameters provided: https://tally.so/embed/EkX2OB?hideTitle=1&dynamicHeight=1
nonGoals: Modifying the backend counseling booking logic or Motoko actor.
Changing the Contact page Tally form.
Altering global styles, fonts, or layout components.
